titleStmt.title: SII 22.39: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 39. (A.R. No. 39 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA—4th YEAR.

summary.p: This records another gift of a lamp by reclamation of 600 kuḻi or 6 mā of land by Śēkkiḻāṉ Ammaiyappaṉ Parāntakadēvaṉ alias Karikālaśōḻa Pallavarāyaṉ of Kuṉṟattūr in Kuṉṟattūr-nāḍu a division of Puliyūr-kōṭṭam alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻavaḷanāḍu in Jayangoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ ... jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puliyūrkoṭṭamāna kulot tuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu kuṉṟattūrnāṭṭu
kuṉṟattūr cekkiḻān Ammaiappan parāntakatevanāna karikālacoḻap pallavaraiyaṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Āk—
kūrnāṭṭut tirukkaṭavūr Uṭaiyār śrīkālakālatevar koyilil tiripuvanac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yā—
ṇṭu nālāvatu mutal Erikiṟa tirununtāviḷakku cantirātittavaṟ cella Ittevar tevatāṉam Erukkāṭṭucceriyil maṇaṟkunṟu kalli
yum kaḻitūrrttum tiruttina nilam Āṟu māvukku Ikkoyilil Eriyum tirununtāviḷakku Oṉṟu ....
Digital edition of SII 22.39 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
